opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every inch of my body is aching, my hands are so swollen they feel tight, and I'm too exhausted to even sit up. It came on hard over the last couple of days and I'm stuck in bed. I've got the arthritis I take the weekly tablet for, but this feels worse and everywhere at once.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's flared up really badly over the last 48 hours and I can barely move — I wanted to know if this needs something urgent or if I can ride it out at home.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on fast over about the last 2 days
symptom_narrative.duration: 48 hours and about the same or a bit worse
symptom_narrative.character: deep aching all over, and my skin feels sore and tender even to a light touch over my shoulders and hips
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — I'm bedbound tonight, moving everything slowly and carefully
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: everywhere — my whole body, but my hands and knuckles feel puffy and my shoulders and hips are the worst for the tender skin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, and I'm really stiff for hours in the mornings
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: heat helps a bit — I've got heat packs all around me in bed
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I'm wiped out, no energy at all, and my head feels foggy and slow
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get flares of the widespread pain and tiredness from time to time, but this one hit harder and faster than usual
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't get out of bed properly, haven't been able to get to the kitchen to drink much today

past_medical_history.how_managed: a tablet once a week and a bit of paracetamol

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives on her own; hasn't managed to get up to the kitchen to eat or drink properly today because of the pain

objective_data_offered.value: 37.3 on my home thermometer, so no real fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: my knuckles look a bit puffy and feel warm, but they're not bright red and it's the same on both hands
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description over video; not a clinician joint examination

objective_data_offered.value: I've hardly had anything to drink today, maybe a glass
